---
title: Multivariate Statistics
description: "Dimensionality reduction, clustering, and classical multivariate methods for data with many correlated variables"
---

When data contain many variables measured on the same units -- gene expression across thousands of transcripts, questionnaire batteries with dozens of items, physiological measurements across multiple domains -- univariate methods are rarely sufficient. Multivariate statistics provides tools for reducing dimensions, discovering structure, classifying observations, and summarising relationships between sets of variables.

This area covers classical methods that remain the default first pass for most multivariate datasets, alongside their modern refinements.

## Methods covered

- Principal component analysis (PCA): derivation, scaling choices, number-of-components selection, biplots
- Factor analysis: exploratory and confirmatory, rotation (varimax, promax, oblimin), goodness-of-fit
- Multidimensional scaling (MDS): metric and non-metric, Shepard diagrams
- Correspondence analysis for categorical data and its multiple-variable extension
- Cluster analysis: hierarchical (agglomerative and divisive), k-means, k-medoids (PAM), DBSCAN
- Cluster validation: silhouette, gap statistic, elbow heuristics, stability by resampling
- Linear and quadratic discriminant analysis
- Canonical correlation analysis: relating two sets of variables
- Partial least squares (PLS) regression and PLS-DA
- Distance and dissimilarity measures: Euclidean, Mahalanobis, Gower, Jaccard, Bray-Curtis

Packages used throughout include `stats`, `FactoMineR`, `factoextra`, `cluster`, `vegan`, `MASS`, `psych`, and `mixOmics`.

<!-- card-grid-injected -->

## Tutorials

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity](bray-curtis.qmd)
The standard ecological distance metric for species-abundance community data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Canonical Correlation Analysis](canonical-correlation.qmd)
Identifying pairs of linear combinations that maximise correlation between two variable sets
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Cluster Validation: Silhouette](cluster-validation-silhouette.qmd)
Measuring how well each observation fits its assigned cluster relative to neighbouring clusters
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Confirmatory Factor Analysis](factor-analysis-confirmatory.qmd)
Testing a pre-specified factor structure against data, with chi-squared and incremental fit indices
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Correspondence Analysis](correspondence-analysis.qmd)
Low-dimensional biplot representation of contingency tables via chi-squared distance
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [DBSCAN Clustering](dbscan-clustering.qmd)
Density-based clustering with automatic noise detection and arbitrary cluster shapes
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Distance and Dissimilarity Measures](distance-measures.qmd)
Euclidean, Manhattan, Minkowski, Canberra, and their use in clustering / MDS
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Exploratory Factor Analysis](factor-analysis-exploratory.qmd)
Identifying latent factors from correlated manifest variables, with extraction, rotation, and number-of-factors decisions
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Factor Rotation](factor-rotation.qmd)
Orthogonal and oblique rotations to make factor loadings interpretable
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Gaussian Mixture Models](gaussian-mixture-models.qmd)
Model-based clustering via mixtures of multivariate normals, fitted by EM
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Hierarchical Clustering](hierarchical-clustering.qmd)
Agglomerative (bottom-up) clustering with various linkage criteria and dendrogram display
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Independent Component Analysis](ica-independent-component-analysis.qmd)
Signal separation: recovering independent latent sources from linear mixtures
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Jaccard and Dice Dissimilarity](jaccard-dissimilarity.qmd)
Distance measures for binary / presence-absence data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Kernel PCA](kernel-pca.qmd)
Non-linear dimensionality reduction via PCA in an implicit feature space
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Linear Discriminant Analysis](linear-discriminant-analysis.qmd)
Classifier assuming multivariate normal within-class distributions with equal covariance
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [MANOVA](manova.qmd)
Multivariate analysis of variance: testing group differences across multiple correlated outcomes jointly
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Mahalanobis Distance](mahalanobis-distance.qmd)
Scale- and correlation-aware distance for multivariate data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Metric Multidimensional Scaling](mds-metric.qmd)
Representing a distance matrix in low-dimensional Euclidean coordinates
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Multiple Correspondence Analysis](multiple-correspondence-analysis.qmd)
Extension of correspondence analysis to more than two categorical variables
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Non-Metric Multidimensional Scaling](mds-nonmetric.qmd)
MDS using only the ranks of distances, minimising Kruskal stress
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [PLS Discriminant Analysis](pls-da.qmd)
PLS extended to classification via dummy-coded class indicators
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Partial Least Squares Regression](pls-regression.qmd)
Regression using latent components optimised for outcome prediction in high dimensions
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Partitioning Around Medoids](pam-kmedoids.qmd)
PAM: robust k-medoids clustering for non-Euclidean distances and outlier-contaminated data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Principal Component Analysis](principal-component-analysis.qmd)
Dimensionality reduction by variance-maximising projection, with interpretation, scaling, and visualisation in R
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Quadratic Discriminant Analysis](quadratic-discriminant-analysis.qmd)
LDA with class-specific covariance matrices; quadratic decision boundaries
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Structural Equation Models](structural-equation-models.qmd)
Combining measurement (CFA) and structural (path) components for latent-variable regression
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Elbow Method](elbow-method.qmd)
Choosing the number of clusters by identifying a bend in the within-cluster sum of squares curve
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Gap Statistic](gap-statistic.qmd)
Choosing the number of clusters via comparison with a null (uniform) distribution
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [UMAP and t-SNE: Overview](umap-tsne-overview.qmd)
Modern non-linear dimensionality reduction for visualisation: UMAP, t-SNE, and their caveats
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [k-Means Clustering](kmeans-clustering.qmd)
Partitioning observations into k clusters by minimising within-cluster sum of squares
:::

:::
